chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ وَفَاتِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 111 – Nazool (Arrival) of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> and his<sup>saww</sup> demise

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (175/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (175/ 5)

parts.text: ذَكَرَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )

text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) مَا بَرَأَ اللَّهُ نَسَمَةً خَيْراً مِنْ مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hajjal, from Hammad,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, and he<sup>asws</sup> mentioned Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> has not Created any creature better than Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 1. md ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from ‘Abdallah ibn Muhammad son of the brother of Hammad al-Katib from al-Husayn ibn ‘Abdallah who has said the following. “I asked abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.), ‘Was the Messenger of Allah the mater of the children of Adam?” The Imam (a.s.) said, ‘By Allah, he was the master of all whom Allah has created. Allah has not created any creature better than Muhammad (s.a.).”
